name: Feature Request
about: Propose a change or addition to agent-flow
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]

BEFORE FILING: Search open AND closed issues and the roadmap (docs/roadmap.md).
Many features have been requested before — some are in progress, some were declined.
-->

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this has not been proposed before

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem from your own experience. What were you doing, what went
wrong or was missing? "It would be cool if..." is not a problem statement. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What specifically do you want to happen? Be concrete — which skill, agent,
or config section changes? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches could solve the same problem? -->

## Is this appropriate for agent-flow core?

<!-- agent-flow is a generic plugin — all project-specific logic belongs in the
consuming project's CLAUDE.md. Would this change benefit users across completely
different projects and tech stacks? -->

<!-- How will we know this is done? Minimum 2 verifiable criteria. -->
